# EntityAlreadyLoadedException class

The exception that is thrown when an actor passes an entity id to [`Load`](../EntityDb.Common.Transactions/TransactionBuilder-1/Load.md) with an entity id that has already been loaded.

```csharp
public sealed class EntityAlreadyLoadedException : Exception
```
